query: I've got a FastAPI service at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/fastapi-app with zero tests. Can you add a smoke suite for it?

We keep wasting half our mornings on broken deploys. This is the repo: plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/express-app. I want a fast test that proves the deploy isn't completely dead before QA touches it.

Need build-verification tests wired into GitHub Actions for the Go HTTP API in plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/go-http-app. Should run on every PR and block merge if anything is red.

I want post-deploy health checks for our axum service before it promotes to prod. Repo is at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/axum-app. Idempotent please — they'll run against the live env.
Help me pick which 5-10 routes our smoke suite should hit. Service is the FastAPI one in plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/fastapi-app.
set up a BVT for plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/express-app
Our existing smoke suite for the FastAPI service at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/fastapi-app takes 7 minutes. What should I cut?

I need an intake testing layer for the Go service in plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/go-http-app — something the deploy pipeline runs first to decide whether the rest of the suite is even worth executing.
What's the difference between sanity tests and smoke tests, and which one do I want for the axum app at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/axum-app?
ship is on fire. need a smoke suite for the express app in plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/express-app. fast.
Can you write unit tests for the order-pricing function in my checkout module? I want full branch coverage and mocks for the tax service.
Design a regression test suite for our payments service so we catch any behaviour change between releases.
Help me write a smoke test for this STM32 board — basically a quick power-on self-check to confirm the peripherals are alive.
I need to load test our API and see how it behaves at 5k RPS. Can you set up a k6 or locust script?
test_create_order keeps flaking in CI — fails maybe 1 in 5 runs. Help me debug it.
Can you explain how the test pyramid applies to a typical microservices setup? Trying to plan our overall testing strategy.
I have a CLI tool written in pure Bash — about 400 lines, exposes a few subcommands. Can you add smoke tests for it?
Our smoke tests live in tests/smoke/ already. Can you review them and tell me what to change? Don't generate a new suite, I want a review.
Add a smoke suite to our Django service. It's a standard Django REST Framework app with about 30 endpoints.
Wire up build-verification tests for our Fastify API. It's similar shape to Express but uses Fastify's plugin model.

Big monorepo here — 1200+ files, several services living under services/*. Need smoke tests for the orders service specifically (services/orders, it's a FastAPI app). Don't crawl the whole repo, it'll take forever.

Two things — please add a smoke suite to the Express app at plugins/quality-assurance/skills/smoke-test/evals/fixtures/express-app, and while you're in there fix the auth middleware bug where it lets requests through with an expired token.
